archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalism (Bold, clashing primaries, thick black borders)

cards.classes: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] p-6 sm:p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFDE59] text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A] font-bold px-6 py-3 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#B2F5EA] text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A] font-bold px-6 py-3 transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF6B6B] text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] font-bold px-6 py-3

inputs.classes: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-none p-4 text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-shadow w-full

badges.classes: bg-[#C3B1E1] text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] px-3 py-1 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider inline-block

chat_bubbles.user: bg-[#B2F5EA] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] p-5 rounded-none shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A]
chat_bubbles.ai: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] p-5 rounded-none shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A]

images.description: Smiling student studying with laptop. Use for welcome screens, empty states, or onboarding to create a friendly human connection.
Colorful minimalist 3D geometric shapes. Perfect for quiz completion screens, empty streaks, or flashcard backgrounds.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure black text (#0A0A0A) over pastel backgrounds to pass APCA and WCAG standards.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All buttons, inputs, links, and actionable items MUST have data-testid kebab-case attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'DM Sans' in the main HTML file.
Strictly follow the Neo-Brutalism aesthetic. DO NOT use generic soft shadows. Use hard solid shadows (e.g. shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]).
No border-radius unless explicitly needed. Use 'rounded-none'.
For complex components (Tabs, Dropdowns, Modals) imported from Shadcn, heavily override styles to remove default Vercel-look. Ensure they adopt the 2px black border and hard shadows.
Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or 4 for dashboard layouts (Bento box approach) with tight gaps (gap-6) and ensure cells stretch using h-full.
Never use full-width cards on desktop, center them or place them in an asymmetrical grid.
Icons should use stroke-width 2.5px to match the bold borders.
Ensure 'data-testid' is attached to all key interactable elements.
Use pure HTML and Tailwind CSS for custom structural sections where Shadcn is too rigid.
